message:
🐛 Fix card caching, flickering, and add local search

- UpgradeStatus: Add version caching with useRef, re-fetch on agent
  reconnect, preserve cached versions for offline clusters
- ClusterComparison: Reset local selection when global filters change
- ClusterHealth: Add local search, fix flickering with loading check
- ClusterCosts: Add local search input
- UpgradeStatus: Add local search, fix flickering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
